# BP-1 negative: error is handled; non-error blanks ignored
lang: go
file: BP-1-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "os"

// WriteFile persists data and returns any write failure.
func WriteFile(path string, data []byte) error {
	return os.WriteFile(path, data, 0644)
}

// HandledMulti reads a file and keeps the error return bound.
func HandledMulti(path string) ([]byte, error) {
	data, err := os.ReadFile(path)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	// blank is not the error return
	n, err := os.Stdout.Write(data)
	_ = n
	return data, err
}

// BuiltinBlank discards non-error builtin results only.
func BuiltinBlank(s string) int {
	// builtins are not error-returning for this rule
	_ = len(s)
	return len(s)
}
